author: Robert Grayson
message:
feat: DB-backed icon management with admin panel, triple finder width

Replace hardcoded icon/section module attributes with database-backed
finder_sections and finder_items tables. Add password-protected admin
panel at /admin/finder for managing sections and items (CRUD, reorder,
visibility). Triple finder window width to 780px and move blog window
next to Phish window.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

author: Robert Grayson
message:
fix: increase OG image text sizes for readability on small previews

Title 46→64, subtitle 20→32, badge 13→18.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

author: Robert Grayson
message:
feat: restore image upload button and add message queue viewer

Restores the Add Image button on the Very Direct Message page and adds
a View Queue button to toggle a scrollable panel showing the last 10 messages.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

author: Robert Grayson
message:
fix: diff content erasure, add git commit on persist, show h1 title

- Fix apply_ops to not drop remaining lines when diff base is out of sync
- Add debounced git commit (10s) after persisting draft content to disk
- Show post title (h1) in article body instead of hiding it
- Silence noisy PubSub warnings in LiveDraftChannel

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

author: Robert Grayson
message:
Add Smart Steps scenario system - interactive branching stories for kids

Includes LiveView pages (index, play, connect, results, dashboard, demo, designer),
backend game logic, session management via DynamicSupervisor, 7 scenario trees,
flip card animations, and channel support for multiplayer sessions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

author: Robert Grayson
message:
Fix receipt API - remove ReceiptPrinter dependency that crashes in production

The format_message/1 function called build_receipt_binary/1 which used
ReceiptPrinter.ReceiptBuilder (not available on Gigalixir). Hermes
handles receipt formatting locally now.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

author: Bobby Nathan
message:
fix compiler warnings: deprecations, unused vars, imports

- Logger.warn -> Logger.warning (3 files)
- use Bitwise -> import Bitwise (2 files)
- Remove unused imports/aliases (5 files)
- Fix @doc on private functions (3 files)
- Fix deprecated <%# comments -> <%!--
- Fix clause grouping issues
- Fix deprecated range syntax 0..-2 -> 0..-2//-1
- Prefix unused variables with underscore (20+ fixes)

author: Bobby Nathan
message:
Add receipt printer API endpoints and local polling service

- Add API endpoints for fetching pending messages and updating status
- Create Python polling service to fetch and print messages locally
- Add authentication via API token
- Configure for 30-second polling interval
- Add LaunchAgent configuration for automatic startup
